description: Final `build/publish.ps1` that publishes to PSGallery using `$env:PSGALLERY_API_KEY`. Refuses to publish a dirty tree unless `-Force`. Supports `-WhatIf`. Displays version + repository before invoking `Publish-Module`.
notes: Never log the API key. Use `[SecureString]` or read directly from env at the call site.
steps: TDD: `-WhatIf` prints planned actions and does not call `Publish-Module`.
TDD: Version + repository displayed before publish.
Replace the skeleton from `f-06` with the full implementation.
Integration test mocks `Publish-Module` to verify the surrounding logic.
name: [pub-04] PSGallery publish wrapper
